vllm.title: [Kernel][Core] Add AWQ support to the Marlin kernel
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds end-to-end support for AWQ quantization inside the Marlin kernel.

Modifies the existing gptq_marlin.cu to support zero-points
Adds a new AWQ on-the-fly repack kernel that converts from AWQ format to Marlin format
Add a new linear layer: awq_marlin.py

Here are initial performance resul

vllm.title: [Model] Initial Support for Chameleon
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR kicks off the effort to add support for Chameleon - Mixed-Modal Early-Fusion Foundation Models from Meta AI. Currently its goal is to match the transformers capability to generate text only from text + images.
This PR itself adds ChameleonForConditionalGeneration for text-to-text inference.

vllm.title: [Misc] Add a wrapper for torch.inference_mode
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: torch.inference_mode is not supported by some hardware backends such as TPU. To address this, this PR introduces a wrapper class that falls back to torch.no_grad for the unsupported backends.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix `vocab_size` field access in LLaVA models
vllm.author: jaywonchung
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For VLMs, config.vocab_size is on its way to deprecation; now config.text_config.vocab_size should be used.
